title: Time to Roll Up My Sleeves...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
It's still a bit early, but I think I'll hop to it and
prep for training—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Hm? What's up? You sound like you're in a pinch.

text_block_list.name: Younger Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Palmer! Um... Well, my friends and I were
supposed to do some fieldwork today...

text_block_list.name: Younger Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
But everyone else who was supposed to help got
sick and can't come. How am I supposed to
handle this all on my ooown?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Ah, okay. How 'bout I lend you a hand? I'm only
one person, but even one extra helper's better
than none, right?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Sure. When it comes to digging in the dirt, I'm
your gal! Let's head over right now.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
(There's still time before training, so I should be
fine as long as I wrap this up fast and get back in
time!)

text_block_list.name: Younger Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Whoa! You're the best tiller I've ever seen!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
The fields are looking good, right? C'mon, let's
keep going!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer gets so absorbed in helping the
younger Umamusume that she forgets all about
training.
